meta.note: Standalone DRYscope pricing model. No third-party data. Prices null until set by the cost model. Price shape = {rem,rep,mat}.
meta.pricing_note: Calibrated to the DRYmedic Parker CO rate schedule (drymedicparker_pricing.json, rev3, eff 2026-05-14). Items without a schedule counterpart (granular demo/fixtures) retain consolidation rates.
meta.est_desc_rule: estimate line = (estVerb+' ' if present)+name+(' — '+option label if option)

items.name: Floor Protection
items.desc: Protect floors and walkways from the entry to the work area.

options.label: Cloth, skid-resistant — 24" wide (per LF)
options.desc: 24-inch skid-resistant runner, per LF.

options.label: Cloth, skid-resistant — 30" wide (per LF)
options.desc: 30-inch skid-resistant runner, per LF.

options.label: Self-adhesive film (per SF)
options.desc: Self-stick film for carpeted paths, per SF.

items.name: Containment Barrier
items.desc: Poly barrier to control dust and cross-contamination; choose sheeting thickness.

options.label: 4-mil
options.desc: Standard 4-mil poly for dust control.

options.label: 6-mil
options.desc: Heavier 6-mil poly — mold and Cat 3 jobs.

items.name: Cover & Protect with Plastic
items.desc: Mask and cover surfaces, cabinets, or contents with plastic sheeting (distinct from a containment wall).

items.name: Tension Posts
items.desc: Spring poles that hold the containment barrier, priced per day.

items.name: Zipper Door
items.desc: Heavy-duty zippered access built into the containment.

items.name: Register / Vent Mask
items.desc: Cover an HVAC register/return to prevent cross-contamination.

items.name: Lay-Flat Ducting
items.desc: Flexible duct to exhaust the negative-air machine.

items.name: Personal Protective Equipment
items.desc: Heavy-duty PPE set for the crew.

items.name: Gloves
items.desc: Disposable protective gloves.

items.name: Respirator Cartridge
items.desc: HEPA / vapor / gas respirator cartridges (per pair).

items.name: Respirator — Full Face
items.desc: Full-face multi-purpose respirator (per day).

items.name: Flooring
items.desc: Remove and bag non-salvageable floor covering; add another entry for a second material in the same room.

options.label: Laminate / LVP
options.desc: Click-lock laminate or LVP lifted and bagged.

options.label: Carpet
options.desc: Wet carpet cut into strips, rolled, and bagged.

options.label: Carpet pad
options.desc: Foam pad beneath the carpet.

options.label: Sheet vinyl
options.desc: Glued sheet vinyl scraped from the substrate.

options.label: Floor tile
options.desc: Ceramic/porcelain demoed to the substrate.

options.label: Hardwood
options.desc: Nailed or glued hardwood pried up and bagged.

options.label: Underlayment
options.desc: Plywood/luan underlayment unscrewed and removed.

options.label: Cement backer board
options.desc: Cement backer board beneath tile.

options.label: Subfloor
options.desc: Structural decking removed to expose joists.

options.label: Uncoupling Membrane
options.desc: Uncoupling membrane scraped from the substrate.

items.name: Tackless Strip
items.desc: Pull and dispose the carpet tack strip around the perimeter.

items.name: Drywall
items.desc: Cut and remove wet drywall; flood cuts price per linear foot at the chosen height, full tear-out per square foot.

options.label: Flood cut 2'
options.desc: Flood cut at 24 in — standard for Cat 1/2 wicking.

options.label: Flood cut 4'
options.desc: Flood cut at 48 in — heavier saturation.

options.label: Full removal
options.desc: Entire sheet removed, per SF.

items.name: Ceiling
items.desc: Remove wet ceiling material and bag for disposal.

options.label: Drywall
options.desc: Wet ceiling board dropped and bagged.

options.label: Suspended tile
options.desc: Drop-in tiles removed; the grid stays.

items.name: Wall Tile
items.desc: Remove non-salvageable wall tile to expose the substrate.

items.name: Insulation
items.desc: Tear out and bag wet insulation (walls or crawl).

items.name: Cavity Drying Holes
items.desc: Drill access holes for in-wall cavity drying.

items.name: Shower / Tub Tile Surround
items.desc: Remove non-salvageable tile surround to expose the wall.

items.name: Sand Exposed Framing
items.desc: Sand exposed framing after demolition.

items.name: Dry-Ice Blasting
items.desc: Dry-ice blast cleaning of exposed framing.

options.label: Standard
options.desc: Standard-intensity dry-ice blasting of framing.

options.label: Heavy
options.desc: Heavy blast for deep char/soot.

items.name: Confined-Space Blasting — Add-On
items.desc: Add-on for blasting in tight/confined spaces.

items.name: Muck-Out / Bulk Debris
items.desc: Remove standing debris and sludge from a flood loss.

items.name: Toilet
items.desc: Disconnect and remove the toilet; reinstall after drying or dispose.

options.label: Disconnect Only
options.desc: Detach without reinstall — same flat detach rate; disposal billed via haul.

items.name: Bathtub
items.desc: Tub pulled for access/drying. Basis: accepted-estimate anchor — flat detach $176.20; reinstall = detach + reset (1.5x).

options.label: Remove Only
options.desc: Detach without reinstall — same flat detach rate; disposal billed via haul.

items.name: Shower Door
items.desc: Remove the shower door/enclosure; reinstall or dispose.

options.label: Remove Only
options.desc: Detach without reinstall — same flat detach rate; disposal billed via haul.

items.name: Sink
items.desc: Disconnect and remove the sink; reinstall or dispose.

options.label: Disconnect Only
options.desc: Detach without reinstall — same flat detach rate; disposal billed via haul.

items.name: Vanity
items.desc: Vanity cabinet. Basis: accepted-estimate anchor — flat detach $28.39/LF; reinstall = 1.5x.

options.label: Remove Only
options.desc: Detach without reinstall — same flat detach rate; disposal billed via haul.

items.name: Cabinets
items.desc: Detach cabinets for drying; reinstall or dispose.

options.label: Upper — Remove Only
options.desc: Detach without reinstall — same flat detach rate; disposal billed via haul.

options.label: Lower — Remove Only
options.desc: Detach without reinstall — same flat detach rate; disposal billed via haul.

items.name: Countertop
items.desc: Detach or tear out countertop; tile prices per square foot.

options.label: Solid / Stone — Remove Only
options.desc: Detach without reinstall — same flat detach rate; disposal billed via haul.

options.label: Laminate — Remove Only
options.desc: Detach without reinstall — same flat detach rate; disposal billed via haul.

items.name: Garbage Disposal
items.desc: Disconnect the disposal unit; reinstall or dispose.

items.name: Dishwasher
items.desc: Pull and disconnect the dishwasher; reinstall or dispose. Basis: anchored to calibrated utility-detach rate (WTR.UTIL $85); dispose = 50%.

items.name: Range / Stove
items.desc: Move and disconnect the range; reinstall or dispose. Basis: anchored to calibrated utility-detach rate (WTR.UTIL $85); dispose = 50%.

items.name: Refrigerator
items.desc: Move the fridge for access; reinstall in place or dispose. Basis: anchored to calibrated utility-detach rate (WTR.UTIL $85); dispose = 50%.

items.name: Range Hood / OTR Microwave
items.desc: Remove the vent hood or over-range microwave; reinstall or dispose.

items.name: Laundry Appliance
items.desc: Disconnect and move the washer or dryer; reinstall or dispose. Basis: anchored to calibrated utility-detach rate (WTR.UTIL $85); dispose = 50%.

items.name: Interior Door
items.desc: Remove the door slab for access/drying; rehang or dispose.

items.name: Light Fixture / Ceiling Fan
items.desc: Remove the fixture; reinstall or dispose.

items.name: Mirror
items.desc: Remove the mirror; framed priced each by size, glued per square foot.

options.label: Framed — up to 24"
options.desc: Framed mirror up to 24 inches.

options.label: Framed — 24–48"
options.desc: Framed mirror 24–48 inches.

options.label: Framed — 48"+
options.desc: Framed mirror over 48 inches.

options.label: Glued-on
options.desc: Mastic-glued mirror chipped off, per SF.

items.name: Baseboard
items.desc: Pull the baseboard trim; reinstall or dispose.

options.label: Detach Only
options.desc: Careful pull for reuse; reinstalled by others or later.

options.label: Remove & Reinstall
options.desc: Detach plus reinstallation after drying (1.5x detach).

options.label: Dispose
options.desc: Fast tear-off of non-salvageable trim.

items.name: HEPA Vacuum — Light
items.desc: Initial HEPA vacuum pass across demo'd surfaces.

items.name: Surface Clean
items.desc: Scrub and wipe the affected surface with cleaning agent.

options.label: Walls
options.desc: Mechanical scrub of wall surfaces/framing.

options.label: Floor
options.desc: Scrub and mop of the exposed floor.

options.label: Ceiling / joists
options.desc: Cleaning of exposed ceiling joists/structure.

items.name: HEPA Vacuum — Detailed
items.desc: Final detailed HEPA pass to complete the cleaning sequence.

items.name: Antimicrobial Application
items.desc: Apply EPA-registered antimicrobial to affected surfaces.

items.name: Mold Stain Treatment
items.desc: Treat visible mold/mildew staining where present.

items.name: Dehumidifier
items.desc: Refrigerant/LGR dehumidifier, priced per day.

options.label: Standard
options.desc: LGR refrigerant unit, ~70–100 pint/day.

options.label: XL
options.desc: XL/desiccant unit for large losses.

items.name: Air Mover
items.desc: Drying fan, priced per day.

options.label: Centrifugal
options.desc: Standard snail-type drying fan.

options.label: Axial
options.desc: High-CFM directional fan.

items.name: Air Filtration Device (AFD)
items.desc: HEPA air filtration device / negative-air machine, per day.

options.label: Standard
options.desc: HEPA air filtration device, standard size.

options.label: Large
options.desc: Large negative-air machine.

items.name: Negative-Air HEPA Filter
items.desc: Replacement HEPA filter for the negative-air machine.

items.name: Canister / Backpack HEPA Filter
items.desc: Replacement filter for the HEPA vacuum (Base Charges only).

items.name: Carbon / Odor Filter
items.desc: Activated-carbon filter for odor control.

options.desc: 16-inch activated-carbon odor stage.
24-inch activated-carbon odor stage.

items.name: Wall-Cavity Drying
items.desc: In-wall injection drying system, per day.

items.name: Hardwood Floor Drying Mat
items.desc: Floor drying mat system for hardwood, per day.

items.name: Water Extraction
items.desc: Extract standing water, priced by surface; add multiple entries if a room has both.

options.label: Carpet
options.desc: Weighted extraction pulling water through carpet and pad.

options.label: Hard surface
options.desc: Squeegee/vacuum extraction of standing water.

items.name: Emergency Service Call
items.desc: Emergency response/trip charge.

options.label: During business hours
options.desc: Response during business hours.

options.label: After hours
options.desc: After-hours emergency response rate.

items.name: Equipment Setup & Monitoring
items.desc: Setup, daily monitoring, and takedown labor.

items.name: Equipment Decontamination
items.desc: Clean equipment between jobs, per piece.

items.name: Haul Debris
items.desc: Per pickup-truck load including dump fees.

items.name: General Labor
items.desc: General field labor, per hour.

items.name: Supervisor
items.desc: Supervisor / project manager, per hour.

items.name: Truck-Mount Extraction
items.desc: Truck-mounted extraction unit, per hour.

items.name: Contents Manipulation
items.desc: Moving and protecting contents, per hour.

items.name: Block & Pad Furniture
items.desc: Block and pad furniture, per piece.

items.name: Fire Demo — Soot-Contaminated
items.desc: HMR-rate demo of soot-contaminated materials.

items.name: Fire Pre-Clean — Dry Soot / HEPA Source Removal
items.desc: Dry-soil removal / HEPA source removal pass.

items.name: Fire Wet Clean — Degreaser
items.desc: Degreaser wet cleaning, multiple passes.

items.name: Mechanical Cleaning — Wires/Pipes/Exposed
items.desc: Detail cleaning of wires, pipes, exposed items.

items.name: HMR Labor — Soot Premium
items.desc: Heavy-materials/soot premium labor rate.

items.name: Gas Deodorization (ProKleen G)
items.desc: Gas-phase deodorization treatment, per day.

items.name: Hydroxyl Generator
items.desc: Hydroxyl deodorization, per day (fire/odor).

items.name: Thermal Fog Deodorization
items.desc: Thermal fogging deodorization, per day.

items.name: Air Scrubber — Fire
items.desc: Air scrubber for fire/smoke jobs, per day.

items.name: Contents Cleaning — Smoke/Soot/Nicotine
items.desc: Hand-clean contents, per hour.

items.name: Kitchen Fire Cleaning
items.desc: Full kitchen fire/soot cleaning (lump sum).

items.name: Bathroom Fire Cleaning
items.desc: Full bathroom fire/soot cleaning (lump sum).

items.name: Laundry Room Fire Cleaning
items.desc: Full laundry-room fire/soot cleaning (lump sum).

items.name: Nicotine Residue & Odor — Full Process
items.desc: Full nicotine residue & odor process (lump sum).

items.name: Trauma / Crime Scene Cleanup
items.desc: Biohazard/trauma cleanup (lump sum).

items.name: Asbestos Sampling + Lab + Inspector
items.desc: State-required asbestos testing (sampling, lab, inspector).

items.name: Pre-Remediation Assessment (3rd Party)
items.desc: Independent industrial-hygienist pre-assessment.

items.name: Post-Remediation Verification (3rd Party)
items.desc: Independent clearance / post-verification.

items.name: 3rd-Party Soot/Char/Ash Testing
items.desc: Independent soot/char/ash lab testing.

items.name: Regulated Waste Disposal Container
items.desc: Dumpster / regulated-waste container.

items.name: Lock Box for Access
items.desc: Lock box placed for crew access.

items.name: Temporary Power / Lights / HVAC
items.desc: Temporary utilities, per day.

items.name: Portable Power Distribution Box
items.desc: Portable power distribution box, per day.

items.name: Exit Chamber / Decon Setup
items.desc: Decon/exit chamber build for containment.

items.name: Photo Documentation & Site Inspection
items.desc: Documentation/inspection labor, per hour.

items.name: General Job-Site Final Cleaning
items.desc: Final job-site cleaning, per hour.

items.name: Invoice / Lab / 3rd-Party Handling Fee
items.desc: Handling fee for lab/3rd-party invoices.

items.name: Heat Drying System (E-Tes / FireBird / PDS)
items.desc: Direct-heat drying system, per day.

items.name: Recessed Light / Can
items.desc: Recessed can light: detach & reset for drying access, or remove & dispose.

items.name: Pedestal Sink
items.desc: Two-piece pedestal sink. Basis: ~1.0 hr tech disconnect+reinstall; dispose ~0.45 hr.

items.name: Supply Line
items.desc: Per supply line. Cap: disconnect, thread-seal tape + cap fitting (~10 min + fitting). Cut & cap: shut off and drain house water, cut and permanently cap (~35 min + fitting).

options.label: Cap — tape & fitting
options.desc: Disconnect the line; thread-seal tape and cap fitting (~10 min).

options.label: Cut & Cap
options.desc: House water shut off and drained; line cut and permanently capped (~35 min).

options.label: Remove Only
options.desc: Remove the flexible supply line only.

items.name: P-Trap
items.desc: Sink drain trap disconnected for access or supply-line work.

options.label: Disconnect & Reinstall
options.desc: Disconnect and reassemble after work (~25 min).

options.label: Disconnect Only
options.desc: Disconnect and leave for plumber/recon (~15 min).

items.name: Shower Bench
items.desc: Tiled bench structure demoed to framing, per SF of bench surface.

items.name: Window Treatment
items.desc: Blinds/curtains/drapes taken down and set aside. Never disposed; rehung by owner or reconstruction — detach only.
